About Me

Crafting Intuitive
Digital Worlds

Sumegha Sharma is a passionate and creative UI/UX designer focused on crafting intuitive and visually engaging digital experiences. She specializes in user-centered design, wireframing, prototyping, and modern interface design.

She enjoys transforming ideas into meaningful solutions that solve real-world problems. With a strong eye for detail and aesthetics, she aims to create seamless, functional, and visually appealing user experiences.

She continuously explores new trends, tools, and technologies to improve her skills and deliver high-quality, impactful design work.

UI/UX Design Wireframing Prototyping User Research Visual Design AI Tools Figma Expert
sumeghasharma905@gmail.com @ssumegha_ss

Projects

Featured Work

Real projects — designed with intention, purpose, and a strong focus on user experience.

Project 01

DrainWatch App

Smart Drain Monitoring System

A modern mobile dashboard designed to monitor water levels, flow rate, and system status in real time — giving users full visibility into drain health.

Users needed a simple way to track drain system conditions and prevent overflow or blockage before it became a critical issue.

Designed a clean, intuitive mobile UI with real-time data cards, live status indicators, and quick-action buttons for immediate response.

FigmaMobile UIDashboard
View Case Study →
Project 02

EcoTrack App

Sustainable Lifestyle Companion

A green-focused mobile app that helps users track their carbon footprint and build eco-friendly habits through progress tracking and actionable insights.

Users lacked awareness and accessible tracking tools for measuring their day-to-day environmental impact in a meaningful way.

Created a soft, minimal UI with eco-friendly visuals, intuitive progress bars, and personalized eco-action suggestions for daily habit improvement.

FigmaMobile UIGreen Design
View Case Study →
Project 03

Megha's Espresso

Premium Coffee Website Design

A premium coffee e-commerce website designed to showcase products and deliver a rich, immersive user experience that reflects the brand's warmth and quality.

Coffee brands needed a visually engaging, premium digital presence that would captivate customers and drive conversions.

Designed an elegant dark-themed UI with strong typography, a curated product showcase, and smooth, intentional navigation that felt true to the brand.

FigmaWeb DesignE-Commerce
View Case Study →
Experience

My Journey So Far

2026 · 90 DAYS

Advanced Diploma — UI/UX Design Training

Completed an intensive program at INSD Ludhiana covering user research, wireframing, prototyping, visual design, and AI-integrated design workflows. Worked on real-world projects across mobile app UI, website design, and dashboards.

2026 · ONGOING

Freelance & Practice Projects

Actively building a portfolio through freelance and self-initiated design projects. Delivered designs for mobile apps (DrainWatch, EcoTrack), premium coffee website (Megha's Espresso), and conceptual UI work.

2023 · PRESENT

Bachelor of Arts — 3rd Year

Currently pursuing a Bachelor of Arts degree, deepening foundational knowledge in creative arts and visual communication to complement my practical design expertise.

CORE STRENGTH

Applying deep knowledge of design thinking, information architecture, accessibility, interaction design, and user-centered design philosophy consistently across every project to create experiences people love.
